seoTitle: Oakford vs Ocean Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oakford and Ocean Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Oakford vs Ocean Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oakford and Ocean Beach.
heading: Oakford vs Ocean Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oakford, Western Australia and Ocean Beach, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oakford has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Ocean Beach (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oakford or Ocean Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oakford has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Ocean Beach scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oakford scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Ocean Beach scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oakford or Ocean Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oakford has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
